_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: shRNAi silencing of ErbB2 expression using two different Erbb2 shRNA constructs...reduced Nf2−/− SC NPC neurosphere diameters...and glial differentiation...to WT levels
details: shRNAi silencing of ErbB2 expression using two different Erbb2 shRNA constructs reduced Nf2−/− SC NPC neurosphere diameters and glial differentiation to WT levels
